revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: undo wikidata additions from past 2 hours
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Better_source_needed%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{distinguish|Template:Better source requested|Template:Better sources needed}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{template shortcut|Bsn|Bcn}} {{High-use}} This [[Wikipedia:Template messages|template]] is used in articles to indicate [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|inline citations]] that link to [[WP:NOTRS|insufficiently reliable sources]]. Placed after the source in question, it produces a superscripted notation like this: {{divbox|1=white|3= Most people believe in ghosts.[[#Fakeref1|[1]]]{{Better source needed}} ;References :{{anchor|Fakeref1}}1. {{Cite web |last=Marston |first=John |date=June 22, 2015 |title=What You Need To Know About Ghosts |url=https://example.com |website=Ghostbusters.com}} }} == Usage == Place the template outside the ref tags, like this: {{clear}}<ref>[...body of reference...]</ref>{{Tlx|Better source needed}} You can also include a {{para|reason}} note, which displays as a tool tip upon mouse hover, to describe the issue to interested readers and to leave a record for future editors. For example, the following usage might be appropriate to the arguable claim that "Most people believe in ghosts...": : {{Tlx|Better source needed|reason{{=}}Citation is the Ghostbusters' company website, which may not be entirely objective. |date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} General template for copy-pasting: : {{Tlx|Better source needed|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} Adding this template to an article places the article into [[:Category:All articles lacking reliable references]] or one of its dated subcategories, all part of a collection of categories identifying articles with reliable-sourcing issues. To find all such articles, see [[:Category:Wikipedia articles with sourcing issues]]. === When not to use === Contentious material about [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|living persons]] that is unsourced or poorly sourced should be '''removed immediately'''. Do not tag it: remove it. For more information, see the section on [[WP:BLPREMOVE|contentious material]] in the Biography of Living Persons policy. Material which is doubtful and harmful may be removed immediately, rather than tagged. See [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Unsourced material|Wikipedia:Citing sources § Unsourced material]]. If no citation is given, use the {{Tlx|Citation needed}} tag instead. If the source given is self-published, use {{tlx|Self-published inline}}. If you think the author has a conflict of interest or is otherwise too close to the subject, use {{Tlx|Third-party inline}}. If the source has been surpassed by newer, reliable publications that no longer support the claim in the article, use {{tlx|Obsolete source}}. If you have the time and ability to find a better reference, please do so. Then correct the citation yourself, or correct the article text. After all, {{strong|the ultimate goal is not to merely identify problems, but to fix them}}. == Template data == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "reason": { "label": "Reason", "description": "A reason as to why, or for what content, a better citation is needed.", "type": "string", "autovalue": "The current source is insufficiently reliable ([[WP:NOTRS]]).", "suggested": true }, "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "Provides the month and year of when the template was placed.", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "required": true } }, "description": "This template is used in articles to identify sentences or short passages with information or analysis that has one or more inline citations but which are to insufficiently reliable sources. It produces the super-scripted text \"better source needed\".", "format": "inline" } == Redirects == {{list redirects|Template:Better source needed}} == See also == * {{Tl|Unreliable source?}}, inline template to flag a citation to work the reliability of which is questioned but uncertain * {{Tl|Cite check}}, article/section may have inappropriate or misinterpreted citations * {{Tl|Additional citation needed}}, the present source is insufficient but should be retained * {{Tl|More citations needed}}, article/section has weak or incomplete sources/references/citations * {{Tl|Nonspecific}}, a reference is too imprecise or ambiguous to enable it to be verified * {{Tl|Unreferenced}}, article/section has no sources/references/citations given at all * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]], especially [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Unsourced material|§ Unsourced material]] * [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup#Verifiability and sources|Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup § Verifiability and sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles]] * [[Wikipedia:Verifiability]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Reliability]] {{Inline cleanup tags}} {{Sandbox other|| [[no:Mal:Bedre kilde]] }} [[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
